raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.6.1 to 3.1.4 to support Java 21.
raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21; compilation or runtime failure occurs without upgrading to Spring Boot 3.x.

raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/pom.xml.general_idea: Set the Java source and target version to 21.
raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to JDK 21; the build must target Java 21 to utilize new features and ensure compatibility.

raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/src/main/java/de.general_idea: Replace Spring's ThreadPoolTaskExecutor with JDK 21's virtual thread executor to leverage platform virtual threads.
raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/src/main/java/de.why_exists: Executors.newVirtualThreadPerTaskExecutor() is only available in JDK 21+; using it on older JDKs causes a compile error.

raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/src/main/java/de.general_idea: Add imports for java.util.concurrent.ExecutorService and Executors required for the new virtual thread implementation.
raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/src/main/java/de.why_exists: Missing imports cause compile errors for the new ExecutorService and Executors usage.

raspberrypi-boot-gdata/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.6.1 to 3.1.4 to support Java 21 and modern Spring features.
raspberrypi-boot-gdata/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21; upgrading to 3.x is required for JDK 21 compatibility.

raspberrypi-boot-gdata/pom.xml.general_idea: Set the target Java version to 21 in the Maven properties.
raspberrypi-boot-gdata/pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to JDK 21, so the build must target this version.

raspberrypi-boot-pushover/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent dependency to version 3.1.4 to support Java 21 and modern Spring features.
raspberrypi-boot-pushover/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline; upgrading to Spring Boot 3.x is required for Java 21 compatibility.

raspberrypi-boot-pushover/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to target Java 21.
raspberrypi-boot-pushover/pom.xml.why_exists: The build configuration must match the target JDK version to ensure correct compilation and bytecode generation.

raspberrypi-boot-server/pom.xml.general_idea: Bump Spring Boot parent version to 3.1.4 to align with Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
raspberrypi-boot-server/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline; upgrading to Spring Boot 3.x is required for Java 21 compatibility and access to Jakarta EE 9+ namespaces.

raspberrypi-boot-server/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK baseline.
raspberrypi-boot-server/pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to Java 21; the build configuration must reflect this to ensure correct compilation and bytecode generation.
